title: Three-in-one recycle container
abstract: Each chamber in the container is designed to hold its own type of waste material and emptied independently from one another. The characteristic feature of the container (10) is that it has at least one recyclable solid waste chamber (30) with an independent, lockable hatch (20); at least one non-recycled waste chamber (40) with an independent, lockable hatch (20); at least one liquid oil chamber (50) with a conic shaped oil fill pipe (52) which gets narrower towards the oil reservoir (53); at least one batteries chamber (60) with at least one battery entry hole (62) which allows the disposal of used batteries into batteries box (63) but disallows them to drop out.
claims:
Claims 1. A three-in-one recycle container (10) designed to hold solid (paper, plastic, glass, metal, etc.), liquid oil and battery waste materials characterized in that; it comprises, At least one recyclable solid waste chamber (30) with an independent, lockable hatch (20), At least one liquid oil chamber (50) with a conic shaped oil fill pipe (52) which gets narrower towards the oil reservoir (53). - At least one batteries chamber (60) with at least one battery entry hole (62) which allows the disposal of used batteries into batteries box (63) but disallows them to drop out. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises at least one non-recycled waste chamber (40) with an independent, lockable hatch (20). A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises at least one hatch (20) specifically designed for the recyclable solid waste chamber (30). A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises at least one independent and lockable hatch (20) specifically designed for the non-recycled waste chamber (40). A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises locking mechanisms (22) for each hatch to allow the discharge of only one chamber (and not others) whenever the container is lifted and turned upside down by the garbage trucks during the emptying process. 

 A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises a conic shaped oil fill pipe (52) which gets narrower as it goes deeper into the oil reservoir (53) like an ink pot so that the waste oil inside the oil reservoir (53) do not spill out whenever the container (10) is lifted and turned upside down by the garbage trucks during the emptying process. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises a battery entry hole (62), which permits users to throw their used batteries in but do not allow the used batteries inside the batteries box (63) to be taken out. 8. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises a batteries box hatch (61) or a drawer which would allow the emptying of the used batteries thrown into the batteries box(63). A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises gaskets (70) surrounding the chambers' mouth tightly kissing the hatches in their closed position so that rain waters cannot get into the chambers and liquid waste materials do not get mixed with recyclable wastes during emptying of the container (10). 10. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises wheels (12) under the main body of the container (10), which would allow users to pull or push the container (10) by holding the container handle. 11. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises a solid waste entry slot (31) placed on the front face of the container like a channel which would allow the disposal of solid wastes into the solid waste chamber (30). 12. A container (10) mentioned in claim 1 characterized in that; it comprises cylindrical hatch (32) which would allow the disposal of large-size solid wastes into the solid waste chamber (30).
